title: Ready Tuple
description: Define fixed-length arrays where every position has a specific, required data type.
problemStatement:
Fixed patterns! Declare a tuple `userResult` that MUST contain exactly a string (status) followed by a number (code).

**Requirement:** Initialize it with `['success', 200]`.
hints: Tuples are useful for representing a group of values with different types, like a row in a spreadsheet.
